caption: A man wearing a grey, pointed wig, glasses, a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a black microphone. The background consists of a wall covered in framed photographs and a clothing display area featuring mannequins and "LEE" branded apparel. To the left and right of the man, logos for "THE STALIDO PODCAST" and "GOSS TALK JOY" are visible on the screen. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he speaks. The camera remains static, maintaining a medium shot of the subject, while the background elements and on-screen graphics remain constant.
